title: Wrong behavior of always_ff
body:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/694d1374-e570-4294-b38f-fe220839e32d)
This is my code:
```systemverilog
 always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin\
    if(~reset_n) begin
      pc_reg <= 0;
    end else begin
      pc_reg <= pc;
    end
  end
```
The signal "pc_reg" is not delayed 1 clock cycle as expected
code_blocks:
always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin\
    if(~reset_n) begin
      pc_reg <= 0;
    end else begin
      pc_reg <= pc;
    end
  end
